parameters.description: Canonical alkaline lysis buffer sequence for plasmid miniprep.

citations.title: A rapid alkaline extraction procedure for screening recombinant plasmid DNA
citations.tier_justification: Canonical Birnboim and Doly paper for alkaline lysis plasmid miniprep; P1 (resuspension) / P2 (alkaline SDS lysis) / P3 (neutralization) is the standard modern naming.

parameters.description: Optimal overnight culture volume for a standard plasmid miniprep.

citations.title: QIAGEN QIAprep Spin Miniprep Kit Handbook
citations.tier_justification: QIAGEN handbook recommends 1-5 mL overnight culture for standard miniprep; 5 mL is the standard teaching-lab volume.

parameters.description: Maximum time the lysate can sit in P2 before neutralization, beyond which genomic DNA shearing and irreversible chromosomal contamination become problems.

citations.title: QIAGEN QIAprep Spin Miniprep Kit Handbook
citations.tier_justification: QIAGEN handbook warns that lysis must not exceed 5 min to prevent genomic-DNA contamination.

parameters.description: Purification methods accepted for the miniprep task.

citations.title: QIAGEN QIAprep Spin Miniprep Kit Handbook
citations.tier_justification: QIAGEN handbook confirms silica-membrane column purification as the standard miniprep method; anion exchange is the alternative for higher purity preps.

parameters.description: Minimum elution volume to avoid silica-column matrix carryover.

citations.title: QIAGEN QIAprep Spin Miniprep Kit Handbook
citations.tier_justification: QIAGEN handbook recommends 30-50 uL elution volume for standard spin columns.

parameters.description: Target A260/A280 ratio for pure plasmid DNA (below indicates protein contamination; above indicates RNA).

citations.title: Thermo Fisher 260/280 and 260/230 Ratios Reference
citations.tier_justification: Thermo Fisher technical note defining 1.8-2.0 as the target A260/A280 range for pure DNA.
